summary: Iteration 2 review for Third Rail Systems OÜ — backend API + /memo route + SEO assets + form integration. Backend pytest 7/7 PASSED. Frontend Playwright e2e 14/14 PASSED on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). All previously-required testids still present (problem-card-1..3, platform-feature-1..3, persona-card-1..3, compliance-row-1..3, founder-ceo, founder-cto, estonia-advantage, site-navbar, hero-primary-cta, hero-secondary-cta). Hero secondary CTA navigates correctly to /memo (no longer scroll). Form POSTs to /api/pilot-requests, gets 201 with email_status='stubbed' as expected (RESEND_API_KEY empty), shows the exact success toast 'Pilot assessment request received.' and resets fields. Empty-form submit does NOT call API and shows inline 'Required'/'Select a role' validation. Memo page renders with all 6 TOC items, TOC scroll works, memo-back-link returns to /, memo-cta-contact navigates to /#contact and the contact section is in view (HashScrollHandler works). nav-link-memo, mobile-nav-link-memo, footer-memo-link all navigate to /memo. SEO: /og.png (image/png 200), /robots.txt (200), /sitemap.xml (200 XML), index.html contains application/ld+json blocks and og: meta tags. Zero console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logger is defined AFTER `_send_notification` uses it (logger.info on line 127). At module load this works because the function body is only evaluated at call time, but it's fragile — move logging.basicConfig + logger=getLogger above the function definitions.
server.py: PilotRequest model uses default email_status='queued' but route always overwrites it after _send_notification — minor confusion, fine as-is.

GET /api/pilot-requests is unauthenticated and returns up to 100 raw submissions including emails. For production, this endpoint must be auth-gated (admin only) or removed; right now anyone can enumerate pilot requests — privacy concern given the company's GDPR/duty-of-care positioning.
PilotRequestCreate has no anti-spam (rate limiting / honeypot / hcaptcha). With only stub emails today this is OK, but once Resend is wired live the public form will be abusable.
StrategicMemo.jsx: useReveal hook applied but article is rendered server-side — fine, just confirms reveal animations work on TOC clicks too.
App.js HashScrollHandler uses 50ms setTimeout to wait for mount — works in this app but a more robust approach is to scroll on the target section's mount via ref.
seed_data_creation: Two TEST_-prefixed pilot requests inserted into Mongo `pilot_requests` collection during testing (email_status='stubbed'). Safe to leave or purge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_pilot_requests.py. Run with `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<external_url> pytest backend/tests/test_pilot_requests.py -v`. Form testids (note these for future): input-first-name, input-last-name, input-email (NOT input-corporate-email), select-role-trigger, select-role-option-<value>, submit-pilot-form. RESEND_API_KEY is intentionally empty → email_status='stubbed' is correct.
rca of the issue: No bugs found in this iteration.
